title: Iconography
lede: KIMES iconography covers the 14 official exhibition categories plus a small set of UI utilities. Icons are 1.5px stroke on a 24×24 grid, geometric, single-color via currentColor — they inherit from their parent context.

construction.title: 11.1 — Construction principles
construction.desc: All KIMES icons share one geometry: a 24×24 grid, 1.5px stroke, rounded caps and joins, single-color via currentColor.

rows.v: Outline default · filled for active state

categories.title: 11.2 — Exhibition category icons
categories.desc: KIMES 2026 spans 14 official exhibition categories. Each has a dedicated icon used on signage, floor plans, the website, and the printed catalog index.

utility.title: 11.3 — UI utility icons
utility.desc: Ten utility icons cover the most common interface affordances — search, navigation, action, and feedback. Same construction rules as category icons.

color.title: 11.4 — Color application
color.desc: Icons inherit color from their parent text or active brand theme. No gradients, shadows, or multi-color fills.
color.ruleHtml: Rule — single-color fill via currentColor. No gradients, no shadows, no multi-color illustration.

sizing.title: 11.5 — Sizing scale
sizing.desc: Six standard sizes from inline (16px) to hero (64px+). The same SVG scales without retracing — that's the value of the 24×24 grid.

donts.title: 11.6 — Don'ts
donts.desc: Six common mistakes. Stay flat, stay single-color, stay 16px+.
